fields.title: Grumpier Old Men (1995)
fields.plot_summary: In this sequel to 'Grumpy Old Men', lifelong frenemies John Gustafson and Max Goldman continue their comedic rivalry in a small Minnesota town. When the vivacious Maria Ragetti moves in next door, both men try to win her affection, leading to hilarious antics and schemes. Meanwhile, John's daughter Melanie becomes engaged, causing further tension between the two old friends. As they navigate love, family, and aging, John and Max ultimately come to realize the true value of their friendship.
fields.stars: Jack Lemmon, Walter Matthau, Sophia Loren

fields.title: Copycat (1995)
fields.plot_summary: 'Copycat' follows a criminal psychologist and a detective as they hunt down a serial killer who mimics famous murderers from the past. The tension rises as the killer targets the psychologist, forcing her to confront her own fears and past traumas in a battle of wits and survival.
fields.stars: Sigourney Weaver, Holly Hunter, Dermot Mulroney

fields.title: Now and Then (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Now and Then is a 1995 coming-of-age film directed by Lesli Linka Glatter. The story revolves around four childhood friends who reunite as adults and reminisce about a life-changing summer in 1970. The movie explores themes of friendship, love, loss, and the passage of time as the women confront their past and present selves.
fields.stars: Christina Ricci, Rosie O'Donnell, Thora Birch

fields.title: Twelve Monkeys (a.k.a. 12 Monkeys) (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Twelve Monkeys is a science fiction film that follows the story of a convict from a post-apocalyptic future who is sent back in time to gather information about a deadly virus that wiped out most of humanity. As he navigates the past, he encounters a psychiatrist and a group of activists. The film weaves a complex narrative of time travel, madness, and fate.
fields.stars: Bruce Willis, Madeleine Stowe, Brad Pitt

fields.title: Jumanji (1995)
fields.plot_summary: In 'Jumanji', a magical board game unleashes a world of adventure and chaos when two siblings discover it in an old mansion. Every roll of the dice leads to unpredictable and dangerous events that must be faced in order to finish the game and set things right. As the game's jungle-themed challenges come to life, the players must work together to survive and outsmart the game's traps. With time running out and the stakes high, they must find a way to win before they are trapped in the game forever.
fields.stars: Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst, Bonnie Hunt

fields.title: Casino (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Casino is a crime film directed by Martin Scorsese that follows the rise and fall of mobster Sam 'Ace' Rothstein in the world of gambling and mafia-controlled casinos in Las Vegas. As Rothstein navigates the treacherous underworld, he faces challenges from his volatile friend Nicky Santoro and his tumultuous relationship with his wife Ginger. The movie delves into themes of power, greed, loyalty, and betrayal.
fields.stars: Robert De Niro, Sharon Stone, Joe Pesci

fields.title: Wings of Courage (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Wings of Courage is a biographical drama that tells the story of the pioneers of aviation, Antoine de Saint-Exupéry and Jean Mermoz. The film explores their daring adventures as they push the boundaries of flight in South America. It delves into themes of courage, passion, and the pursuit of dreams.
fields.stars: Craig Sheffer, Val Kilmer, Elizabeth McGovern

fields.title: Heat (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Heat (1995) is a crime thriller directed by Michael Mann. The film follows the cat-and-mouse game between a brilliant master thief, Neil McCauley (portrayed by Robert De Niro), and an obsessive LAPD detective, Vincent Hanna (played by Al Pacino). As McCauley plans a major heist, Hanna is determined to bring him to justice. The intense and gripping narrative explores the complex dynamics between the two characters as their paths inevitably converge, leading to a dramatic and memorable showdown.
fields.stars: Robert De Niro, Al Pacino, Val Kilmer

fields.title: Balto (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Balto is a animated adventure film based on a true story about a half-wolf, half-dog who embarks on a treacherous journey to deliver medicine to a remote Alaskan town suffering from a deadly epidemic. Along the way, Balto faces various challenges and learns the true meaning of heroism and determination. The film showcases themes of courage, friendship, and perseverance, making it a heartwarming and inspiring story for viewers of all ages.
fields.stars: Kevin Bacon, Bob Hoskins, Bridget Fonda

fields.title: When Night Is Falling (1995)
fields.plot_summary: When Night Is Falling is a romantic drama film directed by Patricia Rozema. The movie follows the story of a university professor whose life is turned upside down when she falls in love with a circus performer. As she navigates the complexities of her newfound relationship and her own desires, she is forced to confront her own beliefs and fears.
fields.stars: Pascale Bussières, Rachael Crawford, Henry Czerny

fields.title: Restoration (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Set in the 17th century, Restoration tells the story of Robert Merivel, a talented young physician who is summoned to the court of King Charles II. Merivel's life takes a dramatic turn as he becomes the King's personal physician and is granted wealth and privilege. However, his newfound status comes at a cost as he grapples with love, betrayal, and the fragility of power in a turbulent era of political intrigue and social change.
fields.stars: Robert Downey Jr., Sam Neill, David Thewlis

fields.title: Sudden Death (1995)
fields.plot_summary: In 'Sudden Death', a former firefighter turned fire inspector finds himself in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with terrorists who have taken over a hockey arena during the Stanley Cup Finals. Racing against time, he must not only save the hostages, including his own children, but also prevent a catastrophic explosion that could kill thousands. With tension mounting and stakes high, he must use his skills and resourcefulness to outsmart the terrorists and save the day.
fields.stars: Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J. Barry

fields.title: Dead Man Walking (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Dead Man Walking is a powerful drama based on a true story. It follows the journey of Sister Helen Prejean, a nun who becomes a spiritual advisor to a death row inmate, Matthew Poncelet. As Sister Helen tries to help Matthew come to terms with his crimes and imminent execution, she also grapples with her own beliefs about forgiveness and justice. The film explores themes of redemption, compassion, and the complexities of the justice system.
fields.stars: Susan Sarandon, Sean Penn, Robert Prosky

fields.title: Four Rooms (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Four Rooms is a comedy anthology film directed by Quentin Tarantino and three other directors. The movie consists of four segments, each depicting bizarre and outrageous events that take place in a hotel on New Year's Eve. The quirky characters and absurd situations create a darkly humorous and chaotic narrative.
fields.stars: Tim Roth, Amanda De Cadenet, David Proval

fields.title: Pocahontas (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Pocahontas is an animated musical film directed by Mike Gabriel and Eric Goldberg. The movie tells the fictionalized story of the encounter between Native American woman Pocahontas and Englishman John Smith. Against a backdrop of cultural differences and prejudices, Pocahontas and John Smith find themselves drawn to each other, challenging the norms of their societies.
fields.stars: Irene Bedard, Mel Gibson, David Ogden Stiers

fields.title: Waiting to Exhale (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Waiting to Exhale is a drama film that follows the lives of four African-American women living in Phoenix, Arizona. Each woman is dealing with various personal and romantic struggles, including infidelity, single motherhood, and finding self-worth. As they navigate their challenges, the four friends rely on each other for support and understanding, forming a strong bond that helps them through difficult times. The film explores themes of friendship, love, and empowerment as the women confront their pasts and strive to create better futures.
fields.stars: Whitney Houston, Angela Bassett, Loretta Devine

fields.title: Dracula: Dead and Loving It (1995)
fields.plot_summary: In this horror-comedy spoof, Count Dracula is brought back to life in 19th-century England and wreaks havoc in his attempt to turn the locals into his undead minions. As chaos ensues, a group of vampire hunters led by Dr. Van Helsing try to stop him. The movie is filled with slapstick humor and parodies classic vampire lore, making fun of various horror tropes along the way.
fields.stars: Leslie Nielsen, Mel Brooks, Peter MacNicol

fields.title: Clueless (1995)
fields.plot_summary: Clueless is a modern retelling of Jane Austen's novel Emma, set in a Beverly Hills high school. The film follows the fashionable and popular Cher Horowitz as she navigates the ups and downs of teenage life, friendship, and romance. With her friends by her side, Cher learns valuable lessons about empathy, self-discovery, and the true meaning of love. Clueless is a beloved teen comedy known for its witty dialogue and iconic fashion.
fields.stars: Alicia Silverstone, Stacey Dash, Brittany Murphy
